summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Organic Food Store application. Backend APIs working correctly with minor status code issues. Frontend UI and navigation working perfectly. AI Chat integration working but blocked by API budget limit.

minor_bugs.issue: POST returns 200 instead of 201 for successful creation
minor_bugs.impact: Product creation works correctly, just wrong status code

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_bugs.impact: Authentication blocking works, just different error code

critical_bugs.issue: Budget exceeded for Emergent LLM API (cost: $0.0010535, limit: $0.001)
critical_bugs.impact: AI Chat functionality blocked due to API quota

integration_issues.issue: Chat returns 500 error due to backend API budget exceeded

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 flows working - AI response blocked by budget)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Emergent LLM API budget exceeded ($0.0010535/$0.001). Need to either increase budget limit or provide new API key for AI Chat functionality. Also fix minor backend status codes: POST /api/products should return 201, unauthorized access should return 401.
